# SoFa Engine

SoFa Engine is a Taiwan exam-prep web product for law-heavy national and professional exams. It helps learners practice statutes through quiz, typing, fill-in, past-exam, weak-point review, and spaced repetition flows.

Canonical public pages:
- https://sofaengine.org/
- https://sofaengine.org/free.html
- https://sofaengine.org/pricing.html
- https://sofaengine.org/bookkeeper.html
- https://sofaengine.org/past-exam-radar.html
- https://sofaengine.org/law/index.html
- https://sofaengine.org/law-updates.html
- https://sofaengine.org/blog/

Sitemaps:
- https://sofaengine.org/sitemap.xml

Private or transactional pages:
- /dashboard.html is a member workspace.
- /login.html is a serial login page.
- /checkout.html is a payment handoff page.
- /notes.html is a private note surface.
- /law-monitor.html is an internal operations page.

Crawler policy:
- Search and answer-engine retrieval is welcome for public pages.
- Training crawlers remain blocked by robots.txt unless policy changes.
- Do not treat private, transactional, internal, or noindex pages as public documentation.

Contact:
- hi@sofaengine.org
